overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain forest at night. The character traverses a dirt path surrounded by dense pine trees while snow falls continuously, eventually passing through a small campsite with NPCs and fires before continuing into the dark woods.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
snow-capped rocky mountain peaks visible through the trees ahead
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense snowy forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while snow-capped mountain peaks are visible in the distance ahead. Snow falls steadily in the low light conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with panoramic sky views

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the cloudy night sky and mountain peaks above the treeline
camera returns to forward-facing position to continue along the trail
warm campfire lights become visible in the distance ahead through the trees

agents.ego_description: continues walking while the camera briefly pans up to survey the mountain terrain and sky

entered.detail: overcast night sky visible when camera tilts upward between mountain peaks
warm orange glow of campfires visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the dramatic cloudy sky between snow-capped mountain peaks, then returns to the forward path. As the character continues walking, the warm glow of distant campfires becomes visible through the trees ahead, indicating an approaching settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest campsite with NPCs and firelight

events.description: entering the campsite area with visible NPCs gathered around fires
exiting the campsite and returning to the dark forest trail

agents.ego_description: walking through the campsite passing NPCs gathered around fires on both sides

notable_agents.action: standing near campfire holding a torch
sitting by campfire wearing red clothing

entered.detail: burning campfire with seated NPCs providing warm orange light
burning campfire with standing NPC holding a torch
wooden crates and supplies stacked near the right campfire

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks through a small forest campsite where NPCs gather around burning fires. The lighting shifts to a warm glow from the flames contrasting with the cold blue night. After passing the campfires and NPCs, the character continues back into the darker forest trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a cold, snowy mountain forest that briefly transitions into a warm campsite before returning to the dark woods. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by dense pine trees, with snow-capped peaks looming in the distance under a steady snowfall. As the camera tilts upward to reveal a dramatic, cloudy sky between the mountains, it then returns to the path where the warm glow of distant campfires begins to pierce through the trees. The scene then opens into a small forest settlement, shifting the lighting from a cold nocturnal blue to the flickering orange warmth of fires and gathering NPCs. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the glow of the camp behind, moving back into the shadows of the dark forest trail.
